steps.title: Contrast looks with formation
steps.content: The first sentence says Hverfjall and Toliman may look similar from far away. The second says volcanologists can still tell how the volcanoes differ by formation. The transition must signal that contrast between appearance and expert distinction.

steps.title: Select the contrast signal
steps.content:
• Choice A: Introduces an example, not a contrast.
  • Choice B: Adds information without showing opposition.
  • Choice C: Signals a result, but the second idea is not caused by the first.
  • Choice D: Concedes the similarity while introducing the contrasting expert distinction.
The answer is D.
